creator: avilla@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

It looks like you have CPPFLAGS in CONFIGURE_ARGS, which is not 
supported (nor it makes sense). Should you still have this problem,
please attach your /etc/make.conf and paste the output of
`make -C /usr/ports/devel/qt4-moc -V CONFIGURE_ARGS`.
